basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Research Associate-I Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 12-05-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limits for the Research Associate-I post. Age relaxation for SC/ST candidates is 5% relaxation of marks.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in linguistics. 10+ years of work experience after Masters needed in MT, NLP related projects. Especially with the background of Indian Language to Indian Language. Proficiency in Hindi and Telugu linguistic knowledge.
qualification.details: Research Associate-I: PhD in linguistics 10+ years of work experience after Masters needed in MT, NLP related projects Background of Indian Language to Indian Language Proficiency in Hindi and Telugu linguistic knowledge

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Associate-1 position at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate-1 position at IIT Delhi is 12-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate-1 post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in linguistics and have at least 10 years of post-Master's work experience in MT, NLP related projects, with a specific focus on Indian Language to Indian Language research.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-1 role?
faq.answer: The consolidated fellowship/pay-slab for the Research Associate-1 position is Rs.58,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Research Associate-1 position?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email to Prof. Tanmoy Chakraborty at [email protected], with the advertisement number in the subject line.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details. Age relaxation for SC/ST candidates is 5% relaxation of marks.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Research Associate-1 post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Research Associate-1 position at IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate-1 position will involve an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IITD/IRD/100/2026.

faq.question: Q9. What kind of work experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates are expected to have 10+ years of work experience after their Masters in MT, NLP related projects, particularly with a background in Indian Language to Indian Language research.

faq.question: Q10. What are the required linguistic proficiencies for this position?
faq.answer: Proficiency in Hindi and Telugu linguistic knowledge is required for this Research Associate-1 position.
